acceptance.assertion: Der Blocker managed build residue is not empty wird mit gebundener Pfad-, Repository-, Ref- und Prozess-/Lease-Evidenz reproduziert und als verwaltet-veraltet, aktiv-legitim oder unbekannt klassifiziert.
Unbekannte, fremde, aktive oder lease-gebundene Build-Residuen werden niemals automatisch gelöscht, resettet oder übernommen.
Für eindeutig veraltete, vom Publisher selbst verwaltete Residuen existiert ein atomarer, nachvollziehbarer Cleanup- oder Quarantänepfad; unklare Fälle bleiben fail-closed.
Ein kontrollierter Fleet-Lauf kann nach sicherer Remediation das betroffene Repository wieder verarbeiten oder liefert einen präzisen maschinenlesbaren Blocker ohne Nebenwirkungen.
Regressionstests decken aktive/fremde/veraltete Build-Residuen und Race-/Symlink-Grenzen ab; relevante Fleet-Suites und Review-Gates sind grün.

goal: Den fail-closed Fleet-Publisher-Blocker für nicht leere managed build residue in RepoGround-Quellworktrees so klären, dass legitime fremde oder aktive Build-Zustände niemals blind gelöscht werden, veraltete verwaltete Residuen aber provenance-gebunden diagnostiziert und über einen sicheren Cleanup- oder Quarantänepfad aufgelöst werden können.

completion.outcome: RepoGround Fleet now classifies managed build residue from exact repository/ref, publisher provenance, immutable tree snapshot, observable process references and exact Grabowski path leases. Unknown or active state blocks before any cache effect; only publisher-owned stale and unchanged residue can enter the journaled atomic quarantine path. The historical heimgewebe/grabowski residue remains unknown and untouched.

does_not_establish: historical heimgewebe/grabowski build residue is stale
permission to mutate the historical unknown residue
metadata.scope_reason: T008 scheduling fairness is verified independently. This follow-up isolates the pre-existing source-worktree hygiene blocker and explicitly forbids treating it as permission to mutate foreign state.

source_observation.error: managed build residue is not empty; refusing cleanup: /home/alex/repos/.repoground-sources/heimgewebe__grabowski__main/build

metadata.verification_note: T009 verifies classification, fail-closed boundaries, safe quarantine capability, controlled runtime projection and deployment. It does not classify the historical build as stale, authorize deleting it, establish absence of non-exact leases or claim a successful heimgewebe/grabowski publication.

verified_acceptance.no-blind-delete: Classification and exact lease/process checks complete before any cleanup effect. Unknown, active-legitimate, changed, foreign, symlinked-authority or exact lease-bound state raises a structured blocker with automatic_mutation_authorized=false. The historical build inode, 1508-entry count and tree SHA-256 76507937c693b95b4e7ba9462cdebfa727bf1151641e61b5745f445cc047d3ea were identical before and after the controlled run; caches also remained present.
verified_acceptance.publisher-recovery: The controlled one-repository run used --repo heimgewebe/grabowski and produced published=0, failed=1 with details[0].managed_build_residue as a machine-readable unknown blocker. Exit 1 is the expected fail-closed outcome, not a successful publication claim. No provenance or quarantine path was created for the historical residue.
verified_acceptance.reproduce-and-classify: The deployed publisher reproduced the exact historical blocker for /home/alex/repos/.repoground-sources/heimgewebe__grabowski__main/build and emitted classification=unknown, repository heimgewebe/grabowski, tool commit dc67fdcf668942fdf4b5baef4989ce6e1e952c21, the exact managed source/build path keys, zero active exact leases and the reason that no publisher provenance record exists.
verified_acceptance.safe-remediation: A publisher-owned build is armed before generation and finalized with exact repo/ref identity plus an opaque no-follow tree snapshot. Only stale, unchanged, process-free and exact-path-lease-free residue may be moved atomically under the owner-controlled .repoground-residue-quarantine root. Planned, quarantined, rolled-back and interrupted states have durable receipts and deterministic next-run recovery; automatic deletion remains false.
verified_acceptance.tests-review: 80 focused Fleet runtime tests and the final full local suite with 4697 passed, 2 skipped and 13 deselected were green. PR #1095 passed full pytest, browser, release-candidate, contracts, Ruff, CodeQL, context and task-index checks. Self-review PASS is bound to head ace9c25219188ce995697472a4a0a0b6e09bd678 and diff SHA-256 af8ace13304ba7226ed5b353bb8a7cb6cdd85ef3774ec8172f37e654295e8929. Bureau closeout validation also passed Ruff, 806 tests, the Systemkatalog boundary, registry validity and SQLite integrity; receipt SHA-256 9808c2adddc8a1572be74d55bf4e995c068beac306470e0ab59ddfbdcaa966e1.

title: Fleet-Publisher: fremde Build-Residuen sicher diagnostizieren und auflösen
